ab: yamyan si Namet do vahey da?
en: A: May I ask if si Namet is at home?

ab: yamyan do sahad,asdep jia.
yamyan si Namet do vahey da?
en: A: May I ask if si Namet is at home?

ab: yabo,ikongo mo kala an sya?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She’s not here, what can I do for you?

ab: sino ka?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: akey, si Mapapo ko, iwangan mo pa.
en: A: Grandpa, I am si Mapapo, please open the door.

ab: sino ka?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: mo Tanangen,yaken am,si Masarey.ko kalahen imo a kayalalam ko.
ch: B:Tanangen，我是si Masarey，我來找你玩了。
en: A:Tanangen, I am si Masarey and I have come to play with you.

ab: ka mowney a jia nimacita.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: nonan,ko ikasinalow imo,ai jia ta meykawalam ta.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來聊天吧!
en: B:Yeah! I miss you so much. Come on, let’s chat!

ab: lisna jito,apey ayopen mo a asoy no anyoy.
en: B: Please sit down and drink coconut water.

ab: ayoy
en: A: Thank you.

ab: apey ayopen mo a asoy no anyoy..
en: B: Coconut water please.

ab: asyo asoy no anyoy ya,yatey apiya so keyyopan.
en: A:  Your coconut water is delicious.

ab: koman ta so somon!
en: B: Let’s eat watermelon!

ab: jiaraheta!asyo o rarako a somon ya.
ch: B:好喔!這些大西瓜看起來很棒。
en: A: Yes! These big watermelons look great.

ab: yapiya nakakanan no somon?
en: B: Is the watermelon good?

ab: yatey apiya.
en: A:Yes, it’s really delicious.

ab: ya na nimanengdeng so yoyab ta si ina,mai ka jia koman.
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: mavanow ko pa.
en: A: Okay, I’ll go wash my hands.

ab: jikasnek a koman,mo matarek yamen.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you’re not an outsider.

ab: ko mabsoy,ta yaro ko nyakan.
en: A: I ate a lot, I’m full.

ab: akan pa,jikasnek.
en: B: Eat more, don’t be polite.

ab: yapiya kanen.
en: A:Well, it’s delicious.

ab: mangey ko na,sipisa am mai ko a tomita jimo.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I’m leaving, I’ll see you next time.

ab: noon, sipisa am mai ka a tomita jiaken.
en: B: Okay, come see me next time.

ab: mangey ko na do vahey namen, ta yamahep rana.
en: A: It’s late, I’m going home.

ab: sipisa am mai ka a maci peyyalalam jiaken.
en: B:Come again next time!

ab: makapya ka.
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: noon,no abo vazey mo am, mai ka do ta meyyalalam ta.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
